programme.title: Surf Patrol
programme.desc: A boat has overturned in a remote area north of Sydney and it's feared that the occupants are still in the water. Elsewhere, lifesavers on the Gold Coast are in overdrive with a spate of rescues.

programme.title: Our Town
programme.desc: Come with us on an interesting and informative visit to towns in regional and metropolitan Western Australia. Presented by Brett Novak.

programme.title: Last Chance Learners
programme.desc: In this week's country driving challenge, the learners take a not-so- leisurely drive in the country - how will they cope with the very real farming hazards?

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Sonali Shah is property shopping with a couple from Essex who have a 400,000-pounds budget to find some rural respite in the Suffolk countryside.

programme.title: Harry's Practice
programme.desc: Join Dr Harry Cooper and Dr Katrina Warren for everything you need to know about animals.

programme.title: Million Dollar Minute
programme.desc: A battle of general knowledge, where every correct answer is a step closer to the ultimate test. Can one person, in one minute, win $1 million?

programme.title: Million Dollar Minute
programme.desc: A battle of general knowledge, where every correct answer is a step closer to the ultimate test. Can one person, in one minute, win $1 million?

programme.title: Medical Emergency
programme.desc: A DIY victim heads off to surgery and considers the prospect of spending his life in a wheelchair. A man arrives at the ER with blue hands, lips and feet - can the doctors find the real reason for his strange symptoms? Meet a woman desperately waiting for a double lung transplant as she prepares for lifesaving surgery.

programme.title: NBC Today
programme.desc: International news and weather including interviews with newsmakers in the world of politics, business, media, entertainment and sport.

programme.title: Better Homes and Gardens
programme.desc: Joh visits jockey legends Katelyn Mallyon and James McDonald. Adam makes a cube light. Karen makes a whole baguette with king prawn, minted cabbage and crispy pancetta.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Sonali Shah is property shopping with a couple from Essex who have a 400,000-pounds budget to find some rural respite in the Suffolk countryside.

programme.title: South Aussie with Cosi
programme.desc: This week on South Aussie with Cosi, we take you behind the scenes at the Adelaide Zoo, get a preview of the Adelaide Equestrian Festival, taste some of SA's best seafood and showcase Oakbank Racing.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: After Colgan Air 9446 crashes off Cape Cod, investigators must determine what brought down a widely-used commuter aircraft in under three minutes.

programme.title: Harry's Practice
programme.desc: Join Dr Harry Cooper and Dr Katrina Warren for everything you need to know about animals.

programme.title: Medical Emergency
programme.desc: A DIY victim heads off to surgery and considers the prospect of spending his life in a wheelchair. A man arrives at the ER with blue hands, lips and feet - can the doctors find the real reason for his strange symptoms? Meet a woman desperately waiting for a double lung transplant as she prepares for lifesaving surgery.

programme.title: Better Homes and Gardens
programme.desc: Joh visits jockey legends Katelyn Mallyon and James McDonald. Adam makes a cube light. Karen makes a whole baguette with king prawn, minted cabbage and crispy pancetta.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Ginny Buckley is helping a couple with a 450,000-pounds budget, who want to up sticks from Hertfordshire to make a new life in the Northamptonshire countryside.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Christina Trevanion is in Carmarthenshire, where experts Philip Serrell and Charles Hanson help the teams find profitable antiques to take to auction.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Father Brown is determined to find out why the body of a young man was taken from his graveyard.

programme.title: The Inspector Lynley Mysteries
programme.desc: Lynley and Havers are catapulted into the bizarre world of internet vice when they investigate the mysterious and brutal death of Emily Proctor, a young female barrister. As they peel back the layers of her life, they discover that she left her job at Chambers four months ago and has been working for her elder sister Lisa's online entertainment porn channel. Meanwhile, Lynley rekindles his relationship with wife Helen, and Havers also finds romance with DC Nkata.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch and Brackenreid compete in the caber toss and hammer throw at the Scottish Highland Games but still make time to investigate the murder of a sword dancer.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Father Brown is determined to find out why the body of a young man was taken from his graveyard.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Christina Trevanion is in Carmarthenshire, where experts Philip Serrell and Charles Hanson help the teams find profitable antiques to take to auction.

programme.title: Last Chance Learners
programme.desc: In this week's country driving challenge, the learners take a not-so- leisurely drive in the country - how will they cope with the very real farming hazards?

programme.title: Harry's Practice
programme.desc: Join Dr Harry Cooper and Dr Katrina Warren for everything you need to know about animals.

programme.title: Medical Emergency
programme.desc: A DIY victim heads off to surgery and considers the prospect of spending his life in a wheelchair. A man arrives at the ER with blue hands, lips and feet - can the doctors find the real reason for his strange symptoms? Meet a woman desperately waiting for a double lung transplant as she prepares for lifesaving surgery.

programme.desc: Joh visits jockey legends Katelyn Mallyon and James McDonald. Adam makes a cube light. Karen makes a whole baguette with king prawn, minted cabbage and crispy pancetta.

programme.title: Million Dollar Minute
programme.desc: A battle of general knowledge, where every correct answer is a step closer to the ultimate test. Can one person, in one minute, win $1 million?

programme.title: Million Dollar Minute
programme.desc: A battle of general knowledge, where every correct answer is a step closer to the ultimate test. Can one person, in one minute, win $1 million?

programme.title: Surf Patrol
programme.desc: At the resort town of Byron Bay, lifesavers and the rescue helicopter respond to a cliff base emergency. It's a race against the clock to find the victim. Meanwhile, at Portsea, on Victoria's Mornington Peninsula, board riders find themselves in trouble in a rip. Some kids from the bush get a tough introduction to the surf.

programme.title: Our Town
programme.desc: Come with us on an interesting and informative visit to towns in regional and metropolitan Western Australia. Presented by Brett Novak.

programme.title: Last Chance Learners
programme.desc: A city driving challenge proves all too much for one relationship. Will a change of attitude see David through his driving test?

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Ginny Buckley is helping a couple with a 450,000-pounds budget, who want to up sticks from Hertfordshire to make a new life in the Northamptonshire countryside.

programme.title: Harry's Practice
programme.desc: Join Dr Harry Cooper and Dr Katrina Warren for everything you need to know about animals.

programme.title: Million Dollar Minute
programme.desc: A battle of general knowledge, where every correct answer is a step closer to the ultimate test. Can one person, in one minute, win $1 million?

programme.title: Million Dollar Minute
programme.desc: A battle of general knowledge, where every correct answer is a step closer to the ultimate test. Can one person, in one minute, win $1 million?

programme.title: Medical Emergency
programme.desc: Lung-transplant patient Kerrie anxiously awaits surgery that could save her life; paramedics treat a 61-year-old smoker suffering from emphysema; a car accident victim is treated for a dislocated hip; a gardener arrives with a bad cut that requires surgery to regain full use of his fingers.

programme.title: NBC Today
programme.desc: International news and weather including interviews with newsmakers in the world of politics, business, media, entertainment and sport.

programme.title: House of Wellness
programme.desc: Join Mel Doyle and Shane Crawford where no topic is off limits from mental health, innovations in health, treatments for common illnesses, natural medicines, and explorations into food.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Ginny Buckley is helping a couple with a 450,000-pounds budget, who want to up sticks from Hertfordshire to make a new life in the Northamptonshire countryside.

programme.title: Our Town
programme.desc: Mandurah WA is where we're at this weekend and we have some awesome stories to bring you from one of Australia's fastest growing cities.

programme.title: Sydney Weekender
programme.desc: It's a new take on old school darts at Flight Club Sydney. South West Sydney has a new destination for entertainment. From the coast to the hinterland, there's so much to love on the Central Coast.

programme.title: Kochie's Business Builders
programme.desc: Some businesses start with a business plan. Others start with a deeply personal mission. This week we meet Andrew Whittle, founder of Being Wear, an underwear brand designed to be ultra-comfortable and sensory friendly.

programme.title: Harry's Practice
programme.desc: Join Dr Harry Cooper and Dr Katrina Warren for everything you need to know about animals.

programme.title: Better Homes and Gardens
programme.desc: Joh visits Invisible House in the Blue Mountains. Adam makes some wine bottle holders with a difference. Fast Ed makes some salami-wrapped antipasti.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: The buyers have set their sights on a relocation from Surrey to North Devon. Sonali Shah is taking them to see some of the finest rural properties on the market for their 650,000-pounds budget.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Join Danny Sebastian and experts Izzie Balmer and John Cameron as they go antique hunting in Harrogate, in Yorkshire, before heading to Beverley Racecourse for today's auction.

programme.title: Better Homes and Gardens
programme.desc: Adam & Dr Harry team up to build a designated outdoor dog bathing station. Juliet meets 'assemblage art' sculpturer Karen Roberts. Charlie shares his secrets to ensuring your potted plants will live.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: A couple from urban Hertfordshire with a 550,000 pounds budget have their sights set on moving to the Somerset countryside where Jules Hudson has some splendid properties lined up to tempt them with.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Having already sold their London home, the pressure is on Nicki Chapman to find today's couple their perfect property in wonderful Wiltshire.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: The buyers have set their sights on a relocation from Surrey to North Devon. Sonali Shah is taking them to see some of the finest rural properties on the market for their 650,000-pounds budget.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: A newborn lamb is rushed to the hospital with his insides out. Rohin Aojula must defy the odds and save the baby. As he goes into the woods, Matt Smith's in for a pig surprise.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Join Danny Sebastian and experts Izzie Balmer and John Cameron as they go antique hunting in Harrogate, in Yorkshire, before heading to Beverley Racecourse for today's auction.

programme.desc: At the resort town of Byron Bay, lifesavers and the rescue helicopter respond to a cliff base emergency. It's a race against the clock to find the victim. Meanwhile, at Portsea, on Victoria's Mornington Peninsula, board riders find themselves in trouble in a rip. Some kids from the bush get a tough introduction to the surf.

programme.title: Harry's Practice
programme.desc: Join Dr Harry Cooper and Dr Katrina Warren for everything you need to know about animals.

programme.title: Medical Emergency
programme.desc: Lung-transplant patient Kerrie anxiously awaits surgery that could save her life; paramedics treat a 61-year-old smoker suffering from emphysema; a car accident victim is treated for a dislocated hip; a gardener arrives with a bad cut that requires surgery to regain full use of his fingers.

programme.title: Better Homes and Gardens
programme.desc: Joh visits Invisible House in the Blue Mountains. Adam makes some wine bottle holders with a difference. Fast Ed makes some salami-wrapped antipasti.

programme.title: Better Homes and Gardens
programme.desc: Joh meets Millie Savage, a total rockstar in the jewellery world. Colin's making lamb, mint and halloumi meatballs. Dr Harry's sharing his top tips to discourage brush turkeys from dropping by.
